message:
feat(i18n): add BiDi text tests and complete E2E test suite (bd-ic6i.6)

Add 12 BiDi text E2E tests (reorder, segment mapping, bracket pairing,
Hebrew, numbers in RTL, direction forcing). Complete the bash E2E
orchestrator script with JSONL logging across 12 test groups. Register
i18n test group in run_all.sh. All 58 Rust tests pass, all 12 bash
steps pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
